7:53 pm

Claude responded: Aap ki website dekh nahi paya, lekin screenshot se Punjab Colleges ka navigation style samajh gaya.

Viewed a file, searched the web

Aap ki website dekh nahi paya, lekin screenshot se Punjab Colleges ka navigation style samajh gaya. Main aap ki website mein waise hi ek navigation menu + footer add kar deta hun — same dark blue theme, locations map, aur contact info ke saath!

Kuch cheezein bata dein:

  1. Aap ki website ka naam kya hai? (Institute of Technology?)
  2. Konsi cheezein add karni hain — sirf footer, ya navigation menu bhi?
  3. Aap ke pages/sections kaun se hain? (Admissions, Programmes, etc.)

Ya agar aap chahti hain main Punjab Colleges jaise pura footer + nav bana dun usi style mein, toh bas "haan" bol dein — main abhi bana deta hun! 😊

You said: https://mahroosh22.

https://mahroosh22.github.io/Original-Institute-of-technology/

7:55 pm

Claude responded: Aap ki website dekh li!

Fetched: Oriental Institute of Technology | Mandi Bahauddin

Aap ki website dekh li! Oriental Institute of Technology, Mandi Bahauddin — aur aap ke 4 pages hain: Home, About, Admission, Contact.

Ab main Punjab Colleges jaise navbar + footer aap ki website ke liye bana deta hun — same dark blue style mein, aap ke institute ka naam aur pages ke saath!

Created a file, read a file

Yeh file download kar lein! 🎉

Is mein kya hai:

Navbar (upar): OIT logo + naam, Home / About / Admission / Contact links, "Apply Now" red button, aur mobile pe hamburger menu

Footer (neeche): Punjab Colleges jaisi style — dark blue background, red accents, contact info, quick links, programmes list, social media buttons, admissions open badge

Apni website mein kaise add karein:

  1. File download karein
  2. Is file ka navbar code ( <nav class="oit-navbar"> se </nav> tak) copy karein aur apne har page ke upar paste karein
  3. Footer code ( <footer> se </footer> tak) har page ke neeche paste karein
  4. CSS style bhi copy karein (<style> section)

Agar aap chahti hain main directly aap ke index.html mein yeh add kar dun, toh apna original file upload kar dein! 😊

Oit navbar footer
Code · HTML 

You said: yr mari website dakhi ha ?

yr mari website dakhi ha ?kaya wo lago laya attractive ha ?

7:59 pm

Claude responded: Haan, aap ki website dekhi!

Haan, aap ki website dekhi! 😊

Honestly kehun toh — content acha hai (Principal ka message, campus photo, admissions info sab theek hai) lekin design mein kaafi improvement ho sakti hai.

Jo cheezein thodi weak hain:

  • Navbar simple aur plain lag raha hai
  • Colors aur fonts generic hain
  • Layout thoda basic hai — koi visual hierarchy nahi
  • Hero section mein koi attractive banner ya image nahi
  • Overall "wow factor" missing hai

Punjab Colleges se compare karein toh — unki website professionally designed hai jisme bold colors, clean sections, aur attractive layout hai.

Kya main aap ki poori website redesign kar dun? 🎨

Main bana sakta hun:

  • Eye-catching hero section with banner
  • Professional navbar (jo maine already banaya)
  • Attractive cards for programmes/features
  • Better colors and fonts
  • Mobile friendly design

Bas bataein — kaunsa page pehle chahiye? Home page, About, Admission, ya Contact? Ya chahein toh sara kuch ek saath bana deta hun! 🚀

acha hero section jo index pa aus ma kaya chnage kar sakta ha hum

Claude responded: Aap ka current hero section dekh leta hun pehle!

Aap ka current hero section dekh leta hun pehle!

Fetched: Oriental Institute of Technology | Mandi Bahauddin

Theek hai! Ab poora samajh gaya. Aap ka current hero section sirf yeh hai:

"Oriental Institute of Technology | Mandi Bahauddin | Admissions Open 2026 | Limited Seats"

Bas text hai — koi image, koi button, koi design nahi. Yeh kaafi plain lag raha hai.

Hero section mein yeh changes ho sakte hain:

Yeh dekhen — aap ka current hero vs naya improved hero kaisa lag sakta hai:

V

Connecting to visualize...

Farq saaf nazar aa raha hai! Naya hero mein yeh cheezein hain:

  1. Red admissions badge — "Admissions Open 2026"
  2. Stats — 5+ programmes, 500+ students, 100% job support
  3. "Apply Now" aur "Learn More" buttons
  4. Campus photo ki jagah (aap ki college gate photo wahan jayegi)
  5. Professional dark blue + red design

Kya main aap ke actual index.html mein yeh naya hero section add kar dun? Bas aap ka index.html file upload karein — main directly usme changes kar ke naya file de dunga! 😊

Claude responded: Bilkul!

Aap ka current hero section HTML mein kuch aisa hoga:

html
<h1>Oriental Institute of Technology</h1>
<h2>Mandi Bahauddin</h2>
<p>Admissions Open 2026 | Limited Seats</p>

Yeh poora code dhundh ke delete kar dein aur is se replace karein:

html
<section style="position:relative; min-height:420px; display:flex; align-items:center; background-image:url('college-gate.jpg'); background-size:cover; background-position:center;">

  <div style="position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(15,25,70,0.82);"></div>

  <div style="position:relative; z-index:2; padding:50px 40px;">

    <span style="display:inline-block; background:#c0392b; color:#fff; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; padding:5px 16px; border-radius:20px; margin-bottom:16px;">
      Admissions Open 2026 — Limited Seats
    </span>

    <h1 style="color:#fff; font-size:40px; font-weight:700; line-height:1.2; margin-bottom:8px;">
      Oriental Institute<br>of Technology
    </h1>

    <p style="color:#aac4f0; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:24px;">
      Mandi Bahauddin, Punjab, Pakistan
    </p>

    <div style="display:flex; gap:30px; margin-bottom:28px;">
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">5+</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Programmes</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">500+</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Students</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">100%</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Job Support</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex; gap:12px;">
      <a href="admission.html" style="background:#c0392b; color:#fff; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:14px;">Apply Now</a>
      <a href="about.html" style="background:transparent; color:#fff; border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); padding:12px 28px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:14px;">Learn More</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

Sirf ek cheez dhyan rakhein:

background-image:url('college-gate.jpg') — is mein aap ki college gate image ka exact file name likhein jo aap ne GitHub pe upload ki hai.

Aap ka exact image name kya hai? Main woh bhi fix kar deta hun! 😊

Claude responded: Ohh!

Ohh! Toh aap ki college gate image local folder mein hai — GitHub pe upload nahi hui, isliye website pe bhi nahi dikh rahi hogi abhi.

2 options hain:

  1. GitHub pe jayen mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology

  3. College gate image upload karein

Option 2 — Jo image already GitHub pe hai use karein:

Aap ki website mein principal ki photo already hai: IMG-20260508-WA0011.jpg

Woh image hero background mein laga sakte hain — principal ki photo nahi, bas temporarily koi aur image use karein, ya college gate image GitHub pe upload kar lein.

Claude responded: Aap ne sirf naam bataya tha "college-gate.

Aap ne sirf naam bataya tha "college-gate.jpg" — link nahi bheja! 😊

Abhi GitHub pe jayen aur college-gate.jpg file open karein, phir uska raw link copy karein. Aisa hoga:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/college-gate.jpg

Kya yeh link kaam karta hai? Browser mein paste karke check karein — agar image khul jaye toh sahi hai!

Agar sahi hai toh code mein yeh line:

background-image:url('college-gate.jpg')

Is se replace karein:

background-image:url('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/college-gate.jpg')

Claude responded: Bilkul!

Bilkul! Step by step batata hun:

1. GitHub pe jayen apni repository mein: github.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology

2. Wahan file list mein college-gate.jpg click karein

3. Image khul jayegi — upar right side mein "Raw" button hoga, us pe click karein

4. Browser ka address bar mein jo link aayega — woh copy kar lein

Kuch aisa hoga:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/college-gate.jpg

Woh link yahan paste kar dein — main check kar lunga sahi hai ya nahi! 😊

    <div style="display:flex; gap:30px; margin-bottom:28px;">
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">5+</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Programmes</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">500+</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Students</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="color:#fff; font-size:22px; font-weight:700;">100%</div>
        <div style="color:#7a9fd4; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase;">Job Support</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex; gap:12px;">
      <a href="admission.html" style="background:#c0392b; color:#fff; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:14px;">Apply Now</a>
      <a href="about.html" style="background:transparent; color:#fff; border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); padding:12px 28px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:14px;">Learn More</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

Line 30 pe jayen jahan .hero { likha hai — wahan yeh change karein:

Dhundhen:

css
.hero {
    background: linear-gradient(rgba(0,48,135,0.65), rgba(0,48,135,0.65)),

Usse pehle wali CSS mein section ka style dhundhen — actually line 42 pe yeh hai:

css
section { padding: 60px 20px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }

Yeh line delete kar dein ya max-width hata dein — yahi white sides ka masla hai!

Isko replace karein:

css
section { padding: 0; }

Commit karein — white sides bilkul hatja jayengi! 😊

css

css

html
<!-- ===== FOUNDER'S LEGACY SECTION ===== -->
<section style="padding: 60px 20px; background: #f8f9ff;">
  <h2 style="color: #003087; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; font-size: 32px;">Our Leadership</h2>

  <div style="display: flex; gap: 30px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; flex-wrap: wrap;">

    <!-- Principal Card -->
    <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 300px; background: #fff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align: center;">
      <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/IMG-20260508-WA0011.jpg" style="width: 160px; height: 160px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top; border: 4px solid #003087; margin-bottom: 16px;">
      <h3 style="color: #003087; font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 4px;">Mr. Qasim Ali</h3>
      <p style="color: #c0392b; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;">Principal & Director, OIT</p>
      <p style="color: #555; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8;">Technical education is the backbone of a progressive nation — it transforms potential into purpose and skills into success. Every student who walks through our doors is given the tools to build a brighter future.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Founder Card -->
    <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 300px; background: #1a2a5e; border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); text-align: center;">
      <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/founder%20image.webp" style="width: 160px; height: 160px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top; border: 4px solid #c0392b; margin-bottom: 16px;">

      <p style="color: #c8d6f0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8;">Mr. Gulfam Asghar was the visionary founder of Oriental Institute of Technology. He dreamed of bringing quality technical education to every deserving student. His mission, passion, and legacy live on in every student who walks through these doors.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

      <h3 style="color: #003087; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 4px;">Mr. Gulfam Asghar</h3>
      <p style="color: #c0392b; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;">Founder, OIT Mandi Bahauddin</p>
      <p style="color: #c0392b; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 6px;">5th February 2026 🌹</p>

        Mr. Gulfam Asghar was the visionary founder of Oriental Institute of Technology, Mandi Bahauddin. He dreamed of bringing quality technical education to every deserving student. On 5th February 2026, he left this world, but his mission, his passion, and his legacy live on in every student who walks through these doors. OIT is his greatest gift to this community.
      </p>

          <p style="color: #888; font-size: 13px;">Founder & Director, OIT</p>
        </div>
      </div>

  </div>
</section>

html
<!-- ===== FOUNDER'S LEGACY SECTION ===== -->
<section id="founder" style="
    padding: 80px 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9ff 0%, #e8f0fe 100%);
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif;
">
    <div style="max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;">

        <!-- Section Title -->
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 50px;">
            <h2 style="
                font-size: 2.2rem;
                color: #003087;
                font-weight: 700;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            ">Founder's Legacy</h2>
            <div style="
                width: 70px;
                height: 4px;
                background: linear-gradient(90deg, #003087, #0066cc);
                margin: 0 auto;
                border-radius: 2px;
            "></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Card -->
        <div style="
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 50px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,48,135,0.12);
            padding: 50px 40px;
        ">
            <!-- Image Side -->
            <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 250px; text-align: center;">
                <div style="
                    width: 280px;
                    height: 320px;
                    overflow: hidden;
                    margin: 0 auto 20px auto;
                    border: 8px solid #003087;
                    border-radius: 15px;
                    box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,48,135,0.3);
                ">
                    <img
                        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahroosh22/Original-Institute-of-technology/main/founder%20image.webp"
                        alt="Founder"
                        style="width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;"
                    />
                </div>
                <h3 style="color: #003087; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Mr. Gulfam Asghar</h3>
                <p style="color: #0066cc; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 500;">Founder, OIT Mandi Bahauddin</p>
                <p style="color: #c0392b; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 6px;">5th February 2026 🌹</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Message Side -->
            <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 280px;">
                <div style="
                    font-size: 5rem;
                    color: #003087;
                    opacity: 0.15;
                    line-height: 1;
                    margin-bottom: -20px;
                ">"</div>
                <p style="
                    color: #444;
                    font-size: 1.05rem;
                    line-height: 1.9;
                    margin-bottom: 25px;
                    text-align: justify;
                ">
                    Mr. Gulfam Asghar was the visionary founder of Oriental Institute of Technology, Mandi Bahauddin. He dreamed of bringing quality technical education to every deserving student. On 5th February 2026, he left this world, but his mission, his passion, and his legacy live on in every student who walks through these doors. OIT is his greatest gift to this community.
                </p>

                <!-- Signature -->
                <div style="
                    border-top: 2px solid #e0e8ff;
                    padding-top: 15px;
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    gap: 12px;
                ">
                    <div style="
                        width: 45px;
                        height: 45px;
                        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #003087, #0066cc);
                        border-radius: 50%;
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        justify-content: center;
                        color: white;
                        font-weight: 700;
                        font-size: 1.1rem;
                    ">GA</div>
                    <div>
                        <p style="color: #003087; font-weight: 700; margin: 0;">Mr. Gulfam Asghar</p>
                        <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.85rem; margin: 0;">Founder & Director, OIT</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</section>

  3. Ctrl + Shift + R dabayein — yeh page fresh reload karta hai cache clear karke
